response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of diverse full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest equivalents), and architecture — plus notable open-source contributions and process advocacy. His lack of direct Nest.js or Kotlin/Java enterprise experience is offset by deep language adaptability and architectural maturity.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, directly matching a key requirement
Strong advocacy for testing, CI/CD, and engineering best practices with documented workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles, though DLang/Java experience suggests adaptability
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
Some roles span many technologies; could benefit from clearer focus on enterprise automation tooling context
